text: Lesson 113 Small change Listen to the tape then answer this question.
zh: 第113课 零钱 听录音,然后回答这个问题。
zh_hant: 第113課 零錢 聽錄音,然後回答這個問題。

text: Who has got some small change?
Fares, please!
Trafalgar Square, please.
I'm sorry, sir.
I can't change a ten-pound note.
zh: 我没法换开十英镑的钞票。
zh_hant: 我沒法換開十英鎊的鈔票。

text: Haven't you got any small change?
I've got no small change, I am afraid.
I'll ask some of the passengers.
Have you any small change, sir?
I'm sorry.
I've got none.
I haven't got any either.
Can you change this ten-pound note, madam?
zh: 夫人,您能换开这张十英镑的钞票吗?
zh_hant: 夫人,您能換開這張十英鎊的鈔票嗎?

text: I'm afraid I can't.
Neither can I. I'm very sorry, sir.
zh: 我也没有,先生,非常抱歉。
zh_hant: 我也沒有,先生,非常抱歉。

text: You must get off the bus.
None of our passengers can change this note.
zh: 我们车上没人能换开这张钞票。
zh_hant: 我們車上沒人能換開這張鈔票。

text: They're all millionaires!
Except us.
I've got some small change.
So have I.
